summary: Standard mutual confidentiality agreement to evaluate a potential KRAS G12C medicinal-chemistry collaboration. Terms are broadly within house standards, but the governing law and forum sit in the PRC (Shanghai) - recommend moving to Singapore - plus two minor items to align before signature.

issues.title: Governing law & dispute forum
issues.issue: The agreement is governed by the laws of the People's Republic of China, with exclusive jurisdiction in the courts of Shanghai.
issues.recommendation: Change the governing law and forum to Singapore - SIAC arbitration under Singapore law. Neutral, reliably enforceable venue and our house standard for PRC / APAC counterparties.

issues.title: No residuals clause
issues.issue: The agreement lacks a residuals clause; personnel retained (unaided-memory) knowledge is not carved out.
issues.recommendation: Add the standard residuals clause to protect independent development.

issues.title: Confidentiality survival period
issues.issue: The 5-year confidentiality survival exceeds the 3-year house default.
issues.recommendation: Acceptable for early evaluation; negotiate to 3 years if convenient.
